questionHtml:
What is the percentage error if the enthalpy of combustion of a substance is determined experimentally to be −2100 kJ mol−1, but the literature value is −3500 kJ mol−1?


A.  80 %

B.  60 %

C.  40 %

D.  20 %

meta.title: What is the percentage error if the enthalpy of combustion of a substance is determined experimentally to be −2100 kJ mol−1, but the literature value is −3500 kJ mol−1? A. 80 % B.
